creator: andy.kosela@gmail.com
text:
On Mon, 9 Jul 2007 22:30:09 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of ports-mgmt/bpkg,
>
> Please note that PR ports/114463 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/114463
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

Yes, I approve the patch.

regards,
Andy Kosela
Pythagoras Foundation
